raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tahs Grahmatas Eek-
chu Raksts bija: Ka weens
Bauslis dohts taptu eeksh wis-
fahm Walstahm/ wisfeim Lau-
din par Sinnaſchanu / un ka
teem Judeem bij gattaweem buht
ap to Deenn atreebtees pee fa-
veein Eenaidneeekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad isgahje tee Tezzetaji
ahfchu ar tschakleem Kameeteein
un Sirg-Ehseteem steigdamees/
peespeesti zaur ta Kehnixa Wahr-
du/ un ta Pawehlefchana tappe
dohta us Suhsana Pilli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mardakajus isgahje
no ta Kehnixa ar pasillahm un
altahm kehningiskahm Dreh-
behn/ un ar leelu felta Krohni /
un ar weenn Usiwalku no dahr-
ga Andekla un Purpura/un tas
Pilstahts Suhsans gawileja un
lihgsmoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pee teem Judeem bija
Spohschums un Lihgsmiba/ un
Preeks/ un Gohds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir eeksh wisfahm Wal-
stahm/ un wisfös Pilsfahtdöö/
kurrä Weetä ta Kehnixa
Wahrds un Pawehlefchana tap-
pe stahstita/ bija Preeks un Lihg+
niba pee teem Judeem/ Dsibres
un labbas Deenas/ un dauds no
tahs Semnes Landim tappe
Judi/ jo to Judu Bihjaschana
bija pahr teem nahkusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nu dtwipadesinitä
Mehnefi/ schis irr tas
Mehnes Adars/ trefchä-
padełmitä Deenä/ kad ta Kehni-
ka Pawehlefchana atnahze/ ka
to bij darriht tai Deenä/ kad to
Judu Eenaidneeki zerreja pahr
teem waldiht/tad tappe tas oh-
tradi pagreests/ jo tee Judi wal-
dija paschi pahr faweem Eenih-
detajeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Judi fapulzejahs
fawös Pilsfahtdös / eeksh wis-
fahm Walstahm ta Kehnixa A-
asiverus/ ka tee Rohkas veeliktu
pee teem/ kas winnu Nelaini
mekleja/ un ne weens pastahwe-
ja winnu Preekfchä/ jo winnu
Bihjaschana bija pahr wisfeem
Landim nahkusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wisfi Lecli-Kungi Wal-
stäs/ untee Waldneeki un Sem-
mes-Walditaji / un kas ta Keh-
nixa Darbu darrija/ pa-augsti-
naja tohs Judus/ jo ta Bihja-
schana Mardakajus bija pahr
teem nahkusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Mardakajus bija leeß
eeksh ta Kehnixa Naimna / un
winna Slawa isgahje zaur wis-
fahm Walstahm/ jo tas Wihrs
Mardakajus ange augamo/ un
tappe augsts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Judi fawahs prett
wisfeem faweem Eenaidneeekeem
ar Sohbinu / Rauschann / un
Ffffff
"
    }
  ],
